title: Concurrency stack fixes (Channel/Mutex/Hub)
body:
Runtime/concurrency stack fixes for Channel, Mutex, and Hub builtins; advances corelib concurrency test targets toward matrix green.

## What shipped

- Concurrency stack fixes on compiler main (`db4d1e1`, superrepo `b956660`)
- ABI/codegen updates for concurrency builtins and link plan call graph

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`b956660`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/b956660)
- **Completed:** 2026-06-07

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `compiler-corelib`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-corelib-complete`
